case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS LOPEZ, LINDA

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,683.00 FILED BY CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT LOPEZ, LINDA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-09-2002 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUL-09-2002, CONTINUED BY COURT TO SEP-10-2002 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 PER PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST.
